---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Use Case

What are you trying to do? What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you imagine this working. Be as specific or as vague as you like — we can figure out the details.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought of, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, prior art from similar projects, anything helpful.
